text.en: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Doctrina Imperatives below. Until the end of the battle round, that Doctrina Imperative is active for your army, and all units from your army that have the Doctrina Imperatives ability gain the relevant abilities shown below.
PROTECTOR IMPERATIVE

■ Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[HEAVY]** ability
■ Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
■ Each time a melee attack targets this unit, if this unit has the **BATTLELINE** keyword and/or it is within 6" of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS BATTLELINE** units, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
CONQUEROR IMPERATIVE

■ Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.
■ Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
■ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, if this unit has the **BATTLELINE** keyword and/or it is within 6" of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS BATTLELINE** units, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

In your Command phase, select one or more **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** units from your army (including units that are embarked within **TRANSPORTS**). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows:

INCURSION: 1 UNIT
STRIKE FORCE: 2 UNITS
ONSLAUGHT: 3 UNITS

Until the start of your next Command phase, those units gain the **HALO OVERRIDE** keyword. Then, select one of the Override abilities below. Until the start of your next Command phase, units from your army with the **HALO OVERRIDE** keyword have the selected Override ability:
Electromotive Energisation
Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.
Microactuator Bracing
Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in this unit.
Predation Protocols
This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
Muted Servomotors
Models in this unit have the Stealth ability.

• Friendly CORPUSCARII units’ ranged attacks have [Lethal Hits].
  • When a friendly FULGURITE unit has fought, that unit heals D3 wounds.
This detachment has the DATA-PSALM tag and cannot be taken with another DATA-PSALM detachment.
text.de:
• Fernkampfattacken befreundeter Corpuscarii-Einheiten haben [Tödliche Treffer].
  • Wenn eine befreundete Fulguriten-Einheit gekämpft hat, wird jene Einheit um W3 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Datenpsalm und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Daten­psalm gewählt werden.
text.es:
• Los ataques a distancia de las unidades CORPUSCARII amigas tienen [Impactos letales].
  • En cuanto una unidad FULGURITA amiga haya combatido, se cura 1D3 heridas.
Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta DATASALMO y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento DATASALMO.
text.fr:
• Les attaques de tir des unités de Corpuscarii amies ont [Touches Fatales].
  • Quand une unité de Fulgurites a combattu, elle soigne D3 blessure.
Ce détachement a l'étiquette Psaume de Données et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement de Psaume de Données.
text.it:
• Gli attacchi da tiro delle unità di CORPUSCARII amiche hanno [Colpi Letali].
  • Dopo che un’unità di Folgoriti amica ha combattuto, quell’unità guarisce D3 ferite.
Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Datasalmi e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Datasalmi.
text.ja:
• 味方コーパスカリィ・ユニットの射撃攻撃は［会心ヒット］を持つ。
  • 味方フルグライト・ユニットが白兵を行った時、そのユニットは負傷限界をD3ポイント回復する。
このデタッチメントはデータ詩編タグを持ち、他のデータ詩編タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko:
• 아군 코르푸스카리 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [살상타]를 부여합니다.
  • 아군 풀구라이트 유닛이 백병전을 종료했을 때, 그 유닛은 D3 체력을 회복합니다.
이 디태치먼트에 데이터찬가 태그가 부여되며 다른 데이터찬가 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
• 己方科普斯卡单位的远程攻击拥有[致命一击]。
  • 当一个己方电岩单位完成近战后，那个单位治疗 D3 点耐伤。
本分遣队拥有数据诗篇标签，并且不能与另一个拥有数据诗篇标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en:
Friendly Tech-Priest models have:
  • 4+ InSv.
  • Feel No Pain 5+.
Friendly TECH-PRIEST models have the following ability: Baffling Data Screed: In your Shooting phase, when this unit is selected to shoot, if this unit is not battle-shocked, you can use this ability. If you do, roll one D6:
  • On a 2+, select one enemy VEHICLE unit within 12" of this unit. That enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll, with -1 to that battle-shock roll. A unit cannot be selected for this ability more than once per turn.
  • Or: On 2+, those ranged attacks do not prevent this unit from being hidden.
text.de:
Befreundete Techpriester-Modelle haben:
  • 4+ RE.
  • Verletzungen ignorieren 5+.
Befreundete Techpriester-Modelle haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Lähmende Datenpredigt: Du kannst diese Fähigkeit in deiner Fernkampfphase einsetzen, wenn diese Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird und nicht erschüttert ist. Wenn du dies tust, wirf einen W6:
  • Bei 2+ wähle eine feindliche Fahrzeug-Einheit innerhalb von 12" um diese Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus. Eine Einheit kann nicht mehr als einmal pro Zug für diese Fähigkeit gewählt werden.
  • Oder: Bei 2+ verhindern jene Fernkampfattacken nicht, dass diese Einheit versteckt ist.
text.es:
Las miniaturas Tecnosacerdote amigas tienen: Una S Inv de 4+. No hay dolor 5+. Las miniaturas TECNOSACERDOTE amigas tienen esta habilidad: Diatriba de datos abrumadora: En tu fase de disparo, cuando esta unidad se elija para disparar, si esta unidad no está acobardada, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces, tira 1D6:
  • Con 2+, elige 1 unidad VEHÍCULO enemiga a 12" o menos de esta unidad. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de acobardamiento con -1 a la tirada. No puedes elegir la misma unidad para esta habilidad más de una vez por turno.
  • O: Con 2+, esos ataques a distancia no impiden a esta unidad estar oculta.
text.fr:
Les figurines de Technoprêtre amies ont :
  • une SvIn de 4+.
  • Insensible à la Douleur 5+.
Les figurines de Technoprêtres amies ont l'aptitude suivante: Info-sermons Déflecteurs: À votre phase de Tir, quand cette unité est choisie pour tirer, si elle n'est pas ébranlée, vous pouvez utiliser cette aptitude. Dans ce cas, jetez un D6:
  • Sur 2+, choisissez une unité de Véhicule ennemie à 12" ce cette unité. L'unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d'ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet. Une unité ne peut pas être choisie pour cette aptitude plus d'une fois par tour.
  • Ou: Sur 2+, ces attaques de tir n'empêchent pas cette unité d'être cachée.
text.it:
I modelli di Tecnoprete amici hanno:
  • SI 4+.
  • Insensibile al Dolore 5+.
I modelli di Tecnoprete amici hanno la seguente abilità: Flusso Dati Sconcertante: nella tua fase di Tiro, quando questa unità viene scelta per tirare, se questa unità non è traumatizzata puoi usare questa abilità. Se lo fai, tira un D6:
  • Con 2+ scegli un’unità Veicolo nemica entro 12" da questa unità. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi, con -1 a quel tiro per i traumi. Un’unità non può essere scelta per questa abilità più di una volta per turno.
  • Oppure: Con 2+, quegli attacchi da tiro non impediscono a questa unità di essere nascosta.
text.ja:
味方テックプリースト・兵は以下を持つ：
  • 【特防】4+。
  • 『痛みを知らぬもの5+』。
味方テックプリースト・兵は以下のアビリティを持つ： ：閉塞攪乱データ：自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このユニットが射撃を宣言戦闘ショック状態でない場合、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用した場合、D6を1個ロールし、以下の効果を適用する：
  • ロール結果が2+の場合、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ビークル・ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。同じユニットを、同じターン中に、このアビリティの対象として複数回選択することはできない。
  • または：ロール結果が+2の場合、それらの射撃攻撃はその自軍ユニットの隠密状態を解除しない。
text.ko:
아군 기술사제 모델에 다음을 부여합니다.
  • 절대 방호 4+
  • 불굴 5+
아군 기술사제 모델에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 차단성 데이터 쇄언: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 이 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 이 유닛이 전투충격 상태가 아니라면 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, D6를 하나 굴립니다.
  • 값이 2+라면, 이 유닛의 12" 내에 있는 적 기체 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 유닛은 전투충격 굴림을 수행해야 하며, 그 전투충격 굴림에 -1을 적용합니다. 유닛은 턴당 한 번을 초과하여 이 능력의 대상으로 지정될 수 없습니다.
  • 또는, 값이 2+라면, 이 유닛은 그 원거리 공격에도 불구하고 은폐 상태를 유지합니다.
text.zh:
己方技术祭司模型拥有：
  • 4+ InSv。
  • 不觉疼痛 5+。
己方技术祭司模型拥有以下技能 费解数据：在己方射击阶段中，当该单位被选择进行射击，如果该单位不处于战斗震慑状态，您可以使用该技能。若使用，掷一枚 D6：
  • 若结果为 2+，选择一个位于该单位 12" 内的敌方载具单位。那个敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，且那次战斗震慑掷骰 -1。每个回合中一个单位不能被该技能选择超过一次。
  • 或：若结果为 2+，那些远程攻击不会阻止该单位隐藏。

text.en: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in **LEGIO CYBERNETICA** units from your army. In addition, unless that unit is Battle‐shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

**SKITARII INFANTRY**, **SKITARII MOUNTED** and **IRONSTRIDER BALLISTARII** units from your army have the Stealth ability, and each time a ranged attack targets a **SICARIAN** unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following Benedictions of the Omnissiah to be active for **Cult Mechanicus** units from your army until the end of the battle:
PANEGYRIC PROCESSION
Each time a **CULT MECHANICUS** model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within half range, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
CITATION IN SAVAGERY

Each time a **CULT MECHANICUS** unit from your army is selected to fight, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

• Friendly Pteraxii/Infiltrators/Rangers/Serberys Raiders/Serberys Sulphurhounds units have Recon Augury.
  • Friendly Recon Augury units have the following ability:
Enhanced Augurs: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is analysed:
  • While a unit is analysed, that unit has +3" detection range.
text.de:
• Befreundete Pteraxii-/Infiltrator-/Jäger-/Serberys-Husaren-/Serberys-Schwefelhunde-Einheiten haben Späher-Augurium.
  • Befreundete Späher-Augurium-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähigkeit:
Verbesserte Augurien: In deiner Fernkampfphase kann diese Einheit eine für sie sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit ist analysiert:
  • Solange eine Einheit analysiert ist, hat sie +3" Entdeckungs­reichweite.
text.es:
• Las unidades Pteraxii/Infiltradores/Exploradores/Incursores Serberys/Sulfojinetes Serberys amigas tienen Augur de reconocimiento.
  • Las unidades Augur de reconocimiento amigas tienen esta habilidad:
Augures mejorados: En tu fase de disparo, esta unidad puede elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga está analizada:
  • Mientras una unidad esté analizada, tiene +3" al alcance de detección.
text.fr:
• Les unités de Pteraxii/Infiltrateurs/Rangers/Hussards Serberys/Soufredogues Serberys amies ont le mot-clé Augure de Repérage.
  • Les unités d’Augure de Repérage amies ont l’aptitude suivante :
Augures Optimisés : À votre phase de Tir, cette unité peut choisir une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins d’elle. L’unité ennemie est analysée :
  • Tant qu’une unité est analysée, elle a +3" en portée de détection.
text.it:
• Le unità di Pteraxii/Infiltratori/Ranger/Incursori Serberys/Segugi Sulphur Serberys amiche hanno Auguri di Ricognizione.
  • Le unità amiche con Auguri di Ricognizione hanno la seguente abilità:
Auguri Migliorati: nella tua fase di Tiro questa unità può scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12". Quell’unità nemica è analizzata:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è analizzata, quell’unità ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
text.ja:
• 味方プテラクシィ/インフィルトレイター/レンジャー/セルベリス・レイダー/セルベリス・サルファーハウンド・ユニットは偵察占術機を持つ。
  • 味方偵察占術機・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ：
強化占術機：自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択できる。選択された敵ユニットは分析状態になる：
  • ユニットが分析状態である間、そのユニットの発見範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける。
text.ko:
• 아군 프테락시/침투자/추적자/세르베리스 습격자/세르베리스 유황엽견대 유닛에 정찰 조점기를 부여합니다.
  • 아군 정찰 조점기 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다.
증강 조점기: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛을 하나 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 적 유닛은 분석됩니다.
  • 유닛이 분석된 동안에는, 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
text.zh:
• 己方佩莱克斯/渗透者/游侠/塞波利斯掠夺者/塞波利斯硫磺猎手单位拥有侦察卜测仪关键词。
  • 己方侦察卜测仪单位拥有以下技能：
强化卜测仪：在己方射击阶段中，该单位可以选择一个位于其 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位被分析：
  • 在一个单位被分析时，那个单位的侦测范围增加 3"。

text.en: At the start of your Command phase, select one objective marker. Until the start of your next Command phase, that objective marker is your Acquisition objective marker. Each time an **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** model from your army makes an attack, if that model’s unit is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, or if the target of that attack is within range of your Acquisition objective marker, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
BOMBARDMENT

At the start of the first battle round, for each enemy unit within your opponent’s deployment zone, your opponent must decide whether that unit will take cover or stand firm. You then roll one D6 for each of those enemy units and apply the relevant result below:

■ **Unit Standing Firm:** On a 3+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
■ **Unit Taking Cover:** Until the end of the battle round, that unit is Battle-shocked and, on a 5+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
FALLOUT

At the start of your Command phase during the second, third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within your opponent’s deployment zone. On a 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound and must take a Battle-shock test.

Each time a model in a **SKITARII** unit from your army makes an attack:

■ If the Protector Imperative is active for that unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ If the Conqueror Imperative is active for that unit, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1, and, if it is a **HALO OVERRIDE** unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

fluff.en: Fresh imperatives flow down from on high. The orders are simple: eliminate the foe.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: Experienced Tech‑Priests rapidly analyse the foe’s weaknesses and feed the resultant data to their soldiers, who exploit these flaws to destroy their targets.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army makes a Fall Back move.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back, and, if it is a **HALO OVERRIDE** unit, you can re‑roll Desperate Escape tests taken for it.

fluff.en: From their distant strategium pulpit, the Tech‑Priest commander’s guiding hand descends, seizing control of allied minds, steering their troops carefully away from harm whilst maintaining a hail of killing fire.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

fluff.en: Intensifying the locomotive protocols of a war engine - while not dishonouring the machine spirit - is a millennia-proven method to hasten the foe’s demise.

target.en: One **LEGIO CYBERNETICA** or **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE** unit from your army, and one objective marker.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have a Ballistic Skill characteristic of 3+ and the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, but they can only target units within range of the selected objective marker.

fluff.en: Encoded with the schemata of the enemy’s fortified battle lines and auto-codified vectors of attack, the Cohort’s war engines are perfectly aligned to deliver the Machine God’s wrath.

target.en: One **LEGIO CYBERNETICA** or **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, which is improved to Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.

fluff.en: A protective blessing chanted in pentakairic Novabyte moves machine spirits to defy the most esoteric of assaults.

target.en: That **CULT MECHANICUS** model’s unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after you allocate a mortal wound to a **CULT MECHANICUS** model from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, **CULT MECHANICUS** models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

fluff.en: Raising their voices in binharic praise, the Machine God’s disciples bolster their spirits - as well as those that inhabit their augmentations - with iron surely.

target.en: One **CULT MECHANICUS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a **CULT MECHANICUS** model in your unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: In spitting out a staccato chant to the Motive Force, the faithful warriors of the Cult Mechanicus are filled with merciless surety as well as intent.

target.en: One **CULT MECHANICUS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, **CULT MECHANICUS** models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: As the cohorts of the Omnissiah recite their dazzling consecration, energy is redirected to infuse masterwork bionics and even the lambent glow of protective fields ignites in a halo of divine defence.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just before an **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army Consolidates.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", provided your unit ends that Consolidation move within range of your Acquisition objective marker.

restrictions.en: You cannot target a unit with this Stratagem if it is within 3" of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Retrieval of the most sacred and ancient fragments of technology is embedded in loops of alpha-logic.

target.en: One **SKITARII** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase. If that unit is **BATTLELINE**, you can also target one friendly **Skitarii** unit (excluding **BATTLELINE** units) within 6" of it.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time one of those units Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

fluff.en: The Skitarii feel the press of an invisible hand upon their minds as the Machine God drives them forward. Servos are pushed to their structural limits, propelling the faithful on an unstoppable crusade.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. If that unit is **BATTLELINE**, you can also target one friendly **SKITARII** unit (excluding **BATTLELINE** units) within 6" of it.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those units makes a ranged attack, if the target of that attack is within your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Employing targeting data collated by a swarm of servo-skulls released over the enemy’s battle lines, the Machine God’s faithful purge the foe stumbling amidst rad-scourged positions.

target.en: That **SICARIAN** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **SICARIAN** unit from your army declares a charge.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, when your unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: Leading the charge like a keen bayonet locked to a rifle’s barrel, maniples of Sicarians scythe into the enemy amidst a welter of blood and severed limbs.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Acquisition objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: With a surge of targeting data from the war engine as its hatches slam open, the warriors inside pour out with weapons already trained unerringly on the foe.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army (excluding **VEHICLE** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. If that unit is **BATTLELINE**, you can also target one friendly **SKITARII** unit (excluding **BATTLELINE** units) within 6" of it.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets one of those units from your army, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: By briefly unshielding the most corrosive or irradiated components of their being, the warriors of a Raz-Zone Corps can exhale an isotopic fog, sapping the strength of those not injured to its effects.

target.en: One **SKITARII** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. If that unit is **BATTLELINE**, you can also target one friendly **SKITARII** unit (excluding **BATTLELINE** units) within 6" of it.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in those units from your army have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: With a pulse of force-loaded wisdom, microactuators lock into bracing positions, reserve power cells are brought online and the Omnissiah’s holy crusaders are bestowed with a sensation of sacred invulnerability.

target.en: One **LEGIO CYBERNETICA** or **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE** unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

fluff.en: To invigorate the failing machine spirit of a damaged vehicle is a sacred task, greatly aided by certain data-hymns transmitted in the correct sequence.

target.en: One **LEGIO CYBERNETICA** or **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back and you can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

fluff.en: Let the unenlightened be cast down! Let all feel the fire of the Motive Force, and may the sacred engines crunch over their weak bones without impediment!

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Death is irrelevant compared to the hallowed duty of securing the Omnissiah’s knowledge for future retrieval.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en:
If your unit is a **HALO OVERRIDE** unit, it suffers D3 mortal wounds. Select one Override ability. Until the start of your next Command phase, that ability is active for your unit.

**Designer’s Note**: *This means that if the targeted unit already has the* **HALO OVERRIDE** *keyword, it can be affected by multiple Override abilities at the same time, but suffers mortal wounds to do so. Alternatively, if your unit does not have the* **HALO OVERRIDE** *keyword, it instead has the chosen Override ability until the start of your next Command phase, but does not benefit from any other Override abilities that are active.*

fluff.en: By projecting their consciousness into the minds of tech thralls, a Tech‑Priest may significantly enhance their warriors’ lethality. However, doing so risks overloading their combat units’ more limited neural networks. Such hazards are seen as an opportunity to give one’s life in the name of the Omnissiah.

target.en: One **SKORPIUS DUNERIDER** model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, each time an **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit disembarks from that model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

fluff.en: Urgent imperatives flood into the crew thralls of Skitarius transport units, urging them to deploy their cargo of cybernetic soldiers into the heart of the fight.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY** unit (excluding **KATAPHRON** units) from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a **HALO OVERRIDE** unit.

fluff.en: Tech‑Priest commanders process an overwhelming influx of data screeds, analysing this information to read the flow of battle and coordinate the movements of their thralls.

target.en: One **LEGIO CYBERNETICA** or **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS VEHICLE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, the Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for your unit.

fluff.en: Enhanced static chants can briefly raise a war engine’s machine spirits to exultant heights of cogitation and multi-tactical capacity.

target.en: One **SICARIAN**, **PTERAXII**, **SYDONIAN**, **IRONSTRIDER BALLISTARII** or **SKITARII MOUNTED** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if there are no other enemy units within 6" of the unit targeted by that attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The swiftest hunters seek to engage foes with the equations of war in their favour, isolating their quarry and dispatching it with ruthless efficiency.

target.en: One **SKITARII INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

fluff.en: When Skitarii Hunter Cohorts march to war, they do so beneath a shrouding squall of cyber-static and filament-heavy banks of sacred incense.

target.en: Up to two **SICARIAN** units from your army, or one **SKITARII INFANTRY** or **SKITARII MOUNTED** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

restrictions.en: Each unit targeted with this Stratagem must be more than 3" away from all enemy units.

fluff.en: Taking direct control of their cybernetic soldiers’ manoeuvres, the cohort’s commander sees their withdrawal carried out with such precision that they can be pressed back into service from the most efficacious of attack vectors.

target.en: One **SICARIAN**, **PTERAXII** or **SYDONIAN** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

fluff.en: Between their multi-layered bionics and their fanatical faith in the indomitability of these machine-blessings, the most augmented of Skitarii are nigh-impossible to lay low.

target.en: One **SKITARII** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Binharic imperatives flash through neural architecture, driving augmetic muscle-bundles and auto-actuators into overdrive to propel the Skitarii more swiftly into the fray.

target.en: One **CULT MECHANICUS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a **CULT MECHANICUS** model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Rousing code in binharic duometer incites fury for the lost fragments of technological lore. In the grip of vengeance, the devoted extend their remaining functions for one last act of retribution.

target.en: One **CULT MECHANICUS** unit from your army and one enemy unit within 18" of it.

when.en: Start of your Movement phase.

effect.en: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: A cacophonous chorale pours from the emitters and augmented throats of the Cult Mechanicus’ faithful, venerating the Omnissiah in deafening and disconcerting frequencies of praise.

target.en: One **CULT MECHANICUS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of one or more **Cult Mechanicus** models in your unit, adding 1 to the result if that model is an **ELECTRO-PRIEST**. On a 5+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: Summoning the spark of the Machine God’s divinity that burns within them, the Omnissiah’s faithful manifest blazing auras of energy that lay low the unbeliever.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY** unit from your army within range of your Acquisition objective marker that was selected as a target of that charge, and one friendly **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS TRANSPORT**.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.

effect.en: Your unit can embark within that **TRANSPORT**.

restrictions.en: Every model in your unit must be within 3" of that **TRANSPORT** and there must be sufficient transport capacity to embark the entire unit.

fluff.en: Holy data must be hoarded at all costs, and thickly armoured war engines offer swift and secure vaults.

target.en: One **TECH-PRIEST** model from your army and one objective marker within 24" of that model.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit within range of that objective marker. On a 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound and must take a Battle-shock test.

fluff.en: As Tech-Priests order the purge of an area of the battlefield, hazardous bombardments are redoubled in the hopes of turning it into a wasteland.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit has the **SKITARII** keyword, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

fluff.en: Even when retreating temporarily in the face of staunch resistance, the warriors of the Omnissiah keep up their storm of fire and violent blows.

target.en: One **SKITARII** Infantry unit from your army that lost one or more models as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

fluff.en: Rapid threat analysis triggers the Skitarii to return f ire against foes deemed immediate threats, surprising the enemy and thinning their lines.

target.en: Two **SKITARII** units from your army that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit.

when.en: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in both of your units by 1.

restrictions.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

fluff.en: Employing directed binharic entanglement to coordinate their motions, paired squads of Skitarii attack with eerie and lethal synchronicity.

target.en: One **TECH-PRIEST** model from your army and one objective marker within 24" of that model (excluding your Acquisition objective marker).

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, that objective marker is also considered to be one of your Acquisition objective markers for all rules purposes.

fluff.en: Mono-task infoslave skulls range ahead to assess potential sites that must be investigated.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS SMOKE** unit within 6" of it.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, both of those units have the Stealth ability and the Benefit of Cover.

fluff.en: The machine spirits of sanctified war engines can be entreated to release clouds of incense laced with radioactive particles, veiling the faithful from the foe.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

fluff.en: Tri-fold sanctified power cells, fuel canisters and solid slugs have spent a decade in the most irradiated forge temple to certify their lethality.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS MECHANICUS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LANCE]** ability.

fluff.en: Sending reckless surges of motive force through their units, these warriors charge headlong into combat with punishing impact.

target.en: One **SKITARlI** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Select the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** or **[LETHAL HITS]** ability. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. You can instead select the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]**, **[LETHAL HITS]** and **[HAZARDOUS]** abilities to apply to those weapons until the end of the phase.

fluff.en: With Binharic prayers of disengagement, these warriors release the saviour protocols of their weapon spirits to release the guns’ full wrath.

target.en: One **SKITARII VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** model, you can re‑roll the Damage roll.

fluff.en: Supplementary analytic cogitation routines identify targets of primary importance and assist in their rapid elimination.

target.en: That <k>ELECTRO-PRIESTS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>エレクトロ・プリースト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly ELECTRO-PRIESTS Battleclade unit is selected to make an advance move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine Elektropriester-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrückenbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Clado de batalla Electrosacerdotes amiga se elija para hacer un movimiento de avanzar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité d’Électroprêtres amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Clade da Battaglia di Elettropreti amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方エレクトロ・プリースト・バトルクレイド・ユニットが全力移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 전기사제 전투계통 유닛이 급속 이동 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 己方移动阶段中，在一个己方驭电祭司战斗支队单位被选择进行一次突进移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no le impide a esa unidad ser apta para declarar cargas.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour déclarer une charge.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは突撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: With every Binharic chant in praise of the Divine Current, Electro-Priests feel the surge of sacred power. The pulsing nimbus demands a holy circuit which can only be closed by making destructive contact with the foe.
fluff.de: Mit jedem binhären Psalm, den die Elektropriester zu Ehren des Göttlichen Stroms von sich geben, spüren sie einen Anstieg heiliger Kräfte. Der pulsierende Nimbus verlangt nach einem heiligen Kreislauf, den es zu Schließen gilt, indem gewaltsam der Kontakt zum Feind hergestellt wird.
fluff.es: Con cada cántico binario alabando la Corriente Divina, un poder sagrado recorre a los Electrosacerdotes. Esta nube pulsante exige un circuito bendito que solo se cierra al hacer contacto destructivo con el enemigo.
fluff.fr: Dans un chant binhaire adressé au Courant Divin, les Électroprêtres ressentent la montée d'une puissance sacrée. Le nimbus crépitant exige un saint circuit qui peut être fermé seulement en entrant en contact avec l'ennemi.
fluff.it: A ogni canto binario in lode alla Corrente Divina, gli Elettropreti avvertono una scossa di sacra energia. La nube pulsante anela un circuito benedetto, che si può chiudere soltanto attraverso il contatto distruttivo col nemico.
fluff.ja: エレクトロ・プリーストは、神々しき電流を称えるバイナリ聖句を唱えるごとに、神聖なる力のうねりを感じ取る。この脈打つ後光は、敵に破壊をもたらすことによってのみ閉じられる、聖なる回廊を形作ることを求める。
fluff.ko: 거룩한 전류를 찬양하는 바이너릭 성가를 읊조릴 때마다, 전기사제는 흘러넘치는 성스러운 힘을 느낀다. 먹구름이 꿈틀대며 적과 파멸적으로 맞닿아 신성한 회로를 완성할 것을 요구한다.
fluff.zh: 伴随着每一句赞颂神圣电流的二进制圣歌，驭电祭司感受到神圣力量的涌动。那脉动的灵光呼唤着一条神圣的回路，而唯有通过与敌人的毁灭性接触，方能将其闭合。

target.en: That <k>ELECTRO-PRIESTS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>エレクトロ・プリースト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly ELECTRO-PRIESTS unit is selected to attack.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase oder die Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Elektropriester-Einheit zum Attackieren gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad ELECTROSACERDOTES amiga se elija para atacar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité d’Électroprêtres amie est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di Elettropreti amica viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方エレクトロ・プリースト・ユニットが攻撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 전기사제 유닛이 공격을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中或近战阶段中，当一个己方驭电祭司单位被选择进行攻击。

effect.en:
Your unit’s attacks that target a unit within range of an objective can:
  • Re-roll hit rolls of 1.
  • Re-roll wound rolls of 1.
effect.de:
Für Attacken deiner Einheit gegen eine Einheit in Reichweite eines Missionsziels können:
  • Trefferwürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
  • Verwundungswürfe von 1 wiederholt werden.
effect.es:
Los ataques de tu unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad dentro del alcance de un objetivo pueden:
  • Repetir las tiradas para impactar de 1.
  • Repetir las tiradas para herir de 1.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de votre unité qui ciblent une unité à portée d’un objectif peuvent :
  • Relancer les jets de touche de 1.
  • Relancer les jets de blessure de 1.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità entro la gittata di un obiettivo possono:
  • Ripetere i tiri per colpire pari a 1.
  • Ripetere i tiri per ferire pari a 1.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの攻撃が、作戦目標の確保範囲内にいるユニットを攻撃対象にしている場合、以下が可能になる：
  • ヒットロールの出目1をリロールする。
  • ウーンズロールの出目1をリロールする。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 공격이 목표물 범위 내는 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면, 그 공격에 다음을 적용할 수 있습니다.
  • 값이 1인 명중 굴림 재굴림
  • 값이 1인 타격 굴림 재굴림
effect.zh:
您的单位对一个位于目标范围内的单位进行的攻击可以：
  • 重掷结果为 1 的命中掷骰。
  • 重掷结果为 1 的致伤掷骰。

fluff.en: Punishing transgressors has a long and ritualised tradition amongst the unforgiving Electro-Priests, and they will eagerly prove their faith in coruscating violence.
fluff.de: Es ist eine lang bestehende und ritualisierte Tradition unter den erbarmungslosen Elektropriestern, Missetäter zu bestrafen. Mit knisternder Gewalt stellen sie bereitwillig ihren Glauben zur Schau.
fluff.es: Castigar a los transgresores es una tradición longeva y ritualizada entre los implacables Electrosacerdotes, que ansían demostrar su fe mediante violencia voltaica.
fluff.fr: Punir les transgresseurs est une tradition longue et rituelle au sein des intransigeants Électroprêtres, toujours prompts à prouver leur foi dans une violence scintillante.
fluff.it: Le punizioni per le trasgressioni sono una tradizione lunga e ritualizzata fra gli inflessibili Elettropreti, ansiosi di dimostrare la propria fede in scoppi caleidoscopici di violenza.
fluff.ja: 無慈悲なるエレクトロ・プリーストにとって、侵入者に対して苛烈な攻撃を加えることは長年に渡り儀式化された伝統となっている。彼らは煌めく暴威によって己の信仰を熱心に示そうとするのだ。
fluff.ko: 자비 없는 전기사제들은 죄인 징벌을 위한 의식적 전통을 오랫동안 유지하고 있다. 이들은 신앙을 입증하기 위해 기꺼이 번뜩이는 폭력을 행사한다.
fluff.zh: 在那些冷酷无情的驭电祭司之中，惩处违逆者有着悠久且仪式化的传统；他们将满怀热忱，以暴力来证明自身的信仰。

name.ja: 運動量フィードバック

target.en: That <k>ELECTRO-PRIESTS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>エレクトロ・プリースト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged ELECTRO-PRIESTS unit has shot.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, nachdem eine feindliche Einheit auf eine befreundete Elektropriester-Einheit geschossen hat, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que tomó como blanco una unidad ELECTROSACERDOTES amiga no trabada haya disparado.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui a ciblé une unité d’<k>Électroprêtres</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, dopo che un’unità nemica che ha scelto come bersaglio un’unità di Elettropreti amica non ingaggiata ha tirato.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、非接敵状態の味方エレクトロ・プリースト・ユニットを攻撃対象にした射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 전기사제 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 적 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位对一个不处于交战状态的己方 驭电祭司单位进行射击后。

effect.en: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine Ansturmbewegung von bis zu W6" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento súbito de hasta 1D6".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement d'élan de D6" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento d’impeto di massimo D6".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D6mvまでの進撃移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 최대 D6"의 쇄도 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D6" 的迸发移动。

fluff.en: Harnessing the force of the blasphemous enemy’s attacks into energy to fuel a holy retaliatory surge is an act of righteous transmutation.
fluff.de: Die blasphemischen Attacken des Feindes werden zu Energie umgewandelt, die in einer Woge der Rachsucht und einem Akt rechtschaffener Transmutation über ihn kommt.
fluff.es: Canalizar la fuerza de los ataques del enemigo blasfemo como energía para alimentar una represalia santa es un acto de transmutación divina.
fluff.fr: Convertir la force blasphématoire des attaques ennemies en énergie pour alimenter un saint élan de riposte est un acte de transmutation vertueuse.
fluff.it: Convogliare l’energia degli immondi attacchi nemici allo scopo di alimentare un sacro impeto ultore è un atto di trasmutazione buona e giusta.
fluff.ja: 高潔なる変成術により、冒涜的な敵の攻撃の力そのものをエネルギーとして捉え、神聖なる報復のうねりに転換してしまう。
fluff.ko: 불경한 적의 공격에서 에너지를 모아 신성한 보복을 쏟아내는 것은 의로운 변성 행위이다.
fluff.zh: 将敌人的亵渎攻击之力转化为能量，以此为燃料激发起神圣的反击狂潮——此乃正义的转化之举。

target.en: That <k>Tech-Priest</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>テックプリースト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: In your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Tech-Priest unit that is within range of an objective.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete Techpriester-Einheit in Reichweite eines Missionsziels als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad Tecnosacerdote amiga que esté dentro del alcance de algún objetivo.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de Technoprêtre amie qui est à portée d’un objectif.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità Tecnoprete amica che si trova entro la gittata di un obiettivo.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、作戦目標の確保範囲内にいる味方テックプリースト・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 목표물의 범위 내에 있는 아군 기술사제 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段或近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个位于目标范围内的己方技术祭司单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit have -1 AP until that enemy unit has attacked.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit haben -1 DS, bis jene feindliche Einheit attackiert hat.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad tienen -1 FP hasta que esa unidad enemiga haya atacado.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité ont -1 en PA jusqu'à ce que cette unité ennemie ait attaqué.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità hanno -1 VP finché quell’unità nemica non ha attaccato.
effect.ja: その敵ユニットの攻撃が終わるまでの間、その自軍ユニットを対象とする攻撃は【貫】に-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 적 유닛이 공격 수행을 종료할 때까지 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 공격에 관통 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在那个敌方单位完成攻击前，对该单位进行的攻击的 AP -1。

fluff.en: Analysing data from thousands of sources at once, a disciple of the Omnissiah is able to rationalise the enemy’s capabilities and dispense protocols of endurance to their servants.
fluff.de: Ein Anhänger des Omnissiah vermag Daten aus Tausenden Quellen auf einen Schlag zu analysieren und kann die Fähigkeiten seiner Feinde rationalisieren und seinen Anhängern Protokolle der Ausdauer übermitteln.
fluff.es: Analizando datos de miles de fuentes a la vez, un discípulo del Omnissiah puede racionalizar las capacidades del enemigo y dispensar protocolos de resistencia a sus siervos.
fluff.fr: En analysant les données des milliers de sources à la fois, un disciple de l’Omnimessie est capable de rationaliser les capacités ennemies et dispenser des protocoles d’endurance à ses servants.
fluff.it: Analizzando i dati di migliaia di fonti contemporaneamente, un discepolo dell’Omnissiah può analizzare le capacità nemiche e trasmettere ai servitor protocolli di opposizione.
fluff.ja: 万機神の信徒たちは、数千の情報源から同時にデータ分析を行い、敵の戦闘力を合理的に解析しつつ、従僕たちに防勢プロトコルを発令することができる。
fluff.ko: 옴니시아의 제자는 수천 개의 출처에서 밀려들어오는 정보를 분석하여 적의 역량을 합리적으로 추론하고 그에 맞는 인내의 프로토콜을 종복들에게 송달할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 在同时分析了上千个不同的数据信息后，一位欧姆尼赛亚的信徒能够理解敌人的战斗能力并对身边的仆从发布坚韧程序。

target.en: That <k>Tech-Priest</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>テックプリースト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Tech-Priest unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Techpriester-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento cuando una unidad Tecnosacerdote amiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Technoprêtre amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Tecnoprete amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方テックプリースト・ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 기술사제 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 己方移动阶段中，在一个己方技术祭司单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot/declare a charge.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen/einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no le impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar/apta para declarar cargas.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer/déclarer une charge.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare/dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja: • そのユニットは射撃/突撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 사격 수행/돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位进行射击/宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: With a cascade of holy screed, implanted aggression protocols and biochemical triggers can be activated by a Tech-Priest to transmute a seeming rout into a predatory counterstrike.
fluff.de: Mit einer Kaskade heiliger Predigten werden implantierte Aggressionsprotokolle und biomechanische Schaltkreise durch einen Techpriester aktiviert, um aus einem vorgetäuschten Rückzug einen vernichtenden Gegenschlag zu machen.
fluff.es: Con una cascada de código sagrado, se pueden activar protocolos de agresión y detonantes bioquímicos para transformar una aparente derrota en un contraataque depredador.
fluff.fr: Dans une cascade de sermon sacré, des protocoles d’agressivités implantés et des déclencheurs biochimiques peuvent être activés par un Technoprêtre pour changer un repli supposé en contre-attaque féroce.
fluff.it: Con un flusso di dati sacri in cascata, un Tecnoprete può attivare i protocolli di aggressione e l’iniezione di elementi biochimici, così da trasformare un’apparente disfatta in un contrattacco violento.
fluff.ja: 技術司祭は聖なる教義を連綿と発することにより、移植された攻撃プロトコルと生体トリガーを起動し、一見すると潰走したかのように見える状態を、捕食者の逆襲へと変化させることができる。
fluff.ko: 기술사제가 쏟아내는 성스러운 영창은 이식된 호전성 프로토콜과 생화학적 촉발제를 활성화하여 패주를 한순간에 맹렬한 역공으로 전환할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 在连续不断的圣文、植入式进攻程序和生化刺激下，一位技术祭司能够将看似溃败的撤退行动转变为凶残的反攻。

target.en: That <k>Tech-Priest</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>テックプリースト</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Tech-Priest unit starts an action.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Techpriester-Einheit eine Aktion auszuführen beginnt
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Tecnosacerdote amiga inicia una acción.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Technoprêtre amie entreprend une action.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Tecnoprete amica inizia un’azione.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方テックプリースト・ユニットがアクションを開始した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 기술사제 유닛이 특수 행동을 시작할 때.
when.zh: 您的射击阶段中，在一个己方技术祭司单位开始一次行动时。

effect.en: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Aktion verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Esa acción no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Cette action n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quell’azione non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは、そのアクションを行った場合でも、射撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 특수 행동에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次行动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: When a miracle of technology is identified, a Tech-Priest will go to bloody lengths to retrieve it, simultaneously directing the acquisition of their prize and the dismantling of anyone who threatens it.
fluff.de: Wenn ein Wunder der Technologie geortet wird, geht ein Techpriester für dessen Besitz über Leichen und übernimmt gleichzeitig die Leitung über die Bergung wie auch über die Zerstörung aller, die sich in die Nähe wagen.
fluff.es: Cuando se identifica un milagro tecnológico, un Tecnosacerdote hará lo imposible por recuperarlo, dirigiendo simultáneamente la adquisición de su premio y el desmantelamiento de quien lo amenace.
fluff.fr: Lorsqu’un miracle de la technologie est identifié, un Technoprêtre fera tout pour le récupérer, en dirigeant simultanément son acquisition et le démantèlement de quiconque menacerait cette entreprise.
fluff.it: Quando viene identificato un prodigio tecnologico, un Tecnoprete farebbe di tutto per recuperarlo, dirigendo contemporaneamente la sua acquisizione e l’eliminazione di chiunque intenda minacciarlo.
fluff.ja: 技術の奇蹟というべき物が発見された時、技術司祭は流血を厭うことなく、その奪取を試みる。そして対象の確保と、それを脅かす存在の排除を同時に指揮するのだ。
fluff.ko: 기술사제는 식별된 기술의 기적을 회수하기 위해 어떠한 일도 마다하지 않는다. 그들은 취득을 지휘하며 앞을 가로막는 모든 것을 해체해 버릴 것이다.
fluff.zh: 在发现了科技奇迹后，技术祭司会用尽一切手段前去回收，在指挥行动的同时清除一切威胁。

target.en: One friendly unengaged Recon Augury unit.
target.de: Eine befreundete Späher-Augurium-Einheit, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
target.fr: Une unité d’Augure de Repérage non engagée amie.
target.it: Un’unità con Auguri di Ricognizione non ingaggiata amica.
target.ja: 味方の非接敵状態である偵察占術機・ユニット1個。
target.ko: 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 정찰 조점기 유닛 하나.
target.zh: 一名不处于交战状态的侦察卜测仪单位。

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Movement phase.
when.de: Zu Beginn der Bewegungsphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al inicio de la fase de movimiento del oponente.
when.fr: Au début de la phase de Mouvement adverse.
when.it: All’inizio della fase di Movimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段开始时。

effect.en: Your unit has -3" detection range until the end of the turn.
effect.de: Bis zum Ende des Zugs hat deine Einheit -3" Entdeckungs­reichweite.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene +3" al alcance de detección hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr: Votre unité a -3" en portée de détection jusqu’à la fin du tour.
effect.it: La tua unità ha -3" alla distanza di individuazione fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja: そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットの発見範囲は-3mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 턴이 종료될 때까지 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -3"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 直到回合结束前，您的单位的侦测范围 -3"。

fluff.en: With a recalibration of divinatory implants, their information absorption can be redirected as a scrambled emission which the enemy’s senses cannot easily penetrate.
fluff.de: Nach einer Rekalibrierung ihrer Divinationsimplantate kann die Informationsabsorption dieser Truppen als Störsignal abgegeben werden, das für die Sinne des Feindes kaum zu durchdringen ist.
fluff.es: Con una recalibración de los implantes adivinatorios, su absorción de información puede ser redirigida como una emisión distorsionada que los sentidos del enemigo no pueden penetrar fácilmente.
fluff.fr: Grâce à une recalibration d’implants divinatoires, leur absorption d’information peut être redirigée en émission cryptée que l’ennemi ne peut aisément déchiffrer.
fluff.it: Ricalibrando gli impianti divinatori, l’assorbimento di informazioni può essere trasformato in una emissione di disturbo che i sensi dei nemici non riescono a penetrare.
fluff.ja: 占術インプラントを再調整し、情報収集を再指向することで、敵の探知能力では容易に突破できないほどの攪乱電波を放出することができる。
fluff.ko: 예지적 이식물의 정보 수집 기능은 보정을 통해 적이 쉽사리 감지할 수 없는 변환주파수 방출기로 작용할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 经过调校的预知义体能够将原本的信息收集能力改变成释放干扰信号，让敌人难以进行侦测。

target.en: One friendly unengaged Infiltrators/Pteraxii unit.
target.de: Eine befreundete Infiltrator-/Pteraxii-Einheit, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
target.ja: 味方の非接敵状態であるインフィルトレイター/プテラクシィ・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个不处于交战状态的己方渗透者/佩莱克斯单位。

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
when.de: Am Ende der Nahkampfphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al final de la fase de combate del oponente.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Combat adverse.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Combattimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側白兵フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您对手的近战阶段结束时。

effect.en: Place your unit in strategic reserves.
effect.de: Versetze deine Einheit in die strategische Reserve.
effect.es: Coloca tu unidad en la reserva estratégica.
effect.it: Colloca la tua unità nelle riserve strategiche.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを戦略的予備戦力に配置する。
effect.zh: 将您的单位放入战略预备队。

fluff.en: Under the cover of a multi‑spectral burst of binharic feedback, vectors of redeployment can be opened up that are unanticipated and unseen by the enemy.
fluff.de: Im Schutze multispektraler Störwellen binhären Feedbacks können Verlegungsrouten geöffnet werden, die der Feind weder vorhersehen noch erwarten konnte.
fluff.es: Al amparo de una explosión multiespectral de retroalimentación binárica, se pueden abrir vectores de redespliegue imprevistos e invisibles para el enemigo.
fluff.fr: Sous le couvert d’impulsions binhaires multispectre, il est possible d’ouvrir des vecteurs de redéploiement non anticipés par l’ennemi et dissimulés à ses yeux.
fluff.it: Grazie alla copertura offerta da un’esplosione binarica multispettro, i vettori di rischieramento possono allargarsi in modi sorprendenti per i nemici.
fluff.ja: 多重バイナリ・フィードバックの炸裂に隠れる形で、敵が予期したり視認が困難な位置へと再展開するための進路を開くことができる。
fluff.ko: 바이너릭 피드백의 다중스펙트럼 폭발로 가려진 재배치 벡터를 열어 적이 예측할 수도, 발견할 수도 없는 진로로 이동할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 在多频率二进制回馈的掩护下，小队能够通过敌人无法预料和侦测的路径进行再部署。

target.en: That <k>ADEPTUS MECHANICUS</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>帝国技術局</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS MECHANICUS unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>ADEPTUS-MECHANICUS</k>-Einheit <b>zum Schießen gewählt wird</b
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad ADEPTUS MECHANICUS amiga se elija para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de l'Adeptus Mechanicus amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un'unità dell'ADEPTUS MECHANICUS amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方帝国技術局・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 아뎁투스 메카니쿠스 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方机械修会单位被选中进行射击时。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of a friendly RECON AUGURY unit. Your unit’s ranged attacks that target that enemy unit have [IGNORES COVER].
effect.de: Wähle eine sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" um eine befreundete SPÄHER-AUGURIUM-Einheit. Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit gegen jene feindliche Einheit haben [DECKUNG IGNORIEREN].
effect.es: Elige una unidad enemiga visible a 12" o menos de alguna unidad Augur de reconocimiento amiga. Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad que tomen como blanco a esa unidad enemiga tienen [IGNORA COBERTURA].
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins d'une unité d’Augure de Repérage amie. Les attaques de tir de votre unité qui ciblent l’unité ennemie choisie ont [Ignore le Couvert].
effect.it: Scegli un'unità nemica visibile entro 12" da un'unità AUGURI DI RICOGNIZIONE amica. Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio quell'unità nemica hanno [IGNORA LA COPERTURA].
effect.ja: 味方偵察占術機・ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットを攻撃対象とした、その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は［遮蔽無効］を持つ。
effect.ko: 아군 정찰 조점기 유닛의 시야에 들어오며 12" 내에 있는 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [엄폐 무시]를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于一个己方侦察卜测仪单位 12" 内且对其可见的敌方单位。该己方单位对那个敌方单位进行的远程攻击拥有[无视掩体]。

fluff.en: By focusing implanted augurs with split‑second analysis, the foe’s flaws can be exposed and broadcast in a clarion call to the rest of the Omnissiah’s faithful.
fluff.de: Indem implantierte Augurien innerhalb von Bruchteilen einer Sekunde Analysen abliefern, werden die Schwächen dieser Feinde offenbar und können klar und deutlich den restlichen Gläubigen des Omnissiah übertragen werden.
fluff.es: Al enfocar los augures implantados con un análisis instantáneo, las debilidades del enemigo pueden exponerse y transmitirse como una llamada de atención al resto de los fieles del Omnissiah.
fluff.fr: En concentrant une fraction de seconde des augures implantés, les failles de l’ennemi sont exposées et diffusées haut et fort auprès des fidèles de l’Omnimessie.
fluff.it: Concentrando gli auguri integrati su analisi immediate, è possibile individuare i punti deboli dei nemici e comunicarli chiaramente al resto dei fedeli dell’Omnissiah.
fluff.ja: 移植型の卜占機で即時分析を集中的に行うことで敵の弱点を暴き、万機神の信徒たちに警報を発することができる。
fluff.ko: 이식받은 조점기를 집중하여 순간적인 분석으로 적의 결함을 드러낼 수 있다. 이 정보는 다른 옴니시아의 신자들에게 명확히 전달될 것이다.
fluff.zh: 通过对植入的预言器进行瞬间分析，可以揭露敌人的弱点，并以嘹亮的号召向欧姆尼赛亚的信徒们发出警报。
